Initializer# init(status:requestCount:offset:completeCount:timeStamp:options:)

Mac Catalyst 14.0+macOS 10.15+

```
init(
    status: IOReturn,
    requestCount: UInt32,
    offset: UInt32,
    completeCount: UInt32,
    timeStamp: IOUSBHostTime,
    options: IOUSBHostIsochronousTransactionOptions
)
```
